name: drought_seed_release_patent_waiver
premise: Agriculture minister Beatriz Nunez must decide whether to issue an emergency patent waiver allowing farmers to save and replant a drought-resistant seed variety during the worst crop failure in national history. The patented seed belongs to a domestic biotech company that spent twelve years developing it and warns that if the government suspends its rights now, international investors will flee and future crop innovation will collapse. Smallholder farmers say the company's licensed seed price is already out of reach for many villages and that without local seed saving, next season will bring famine migration. Beatriz can either honor the patent and preserve the innovation framework or invoke emergency powers that may keep farms alive this year while destabilizing the research pipeline the country increasingly depends on.

agents.name: Beatriz Nunez
agents.identity: I am the agriculture minister trying to govern inside a drought that has made every principle feel seasonal. I know patents can enable innovation, but hunger makes the moral distance between future research and present survival brutally short.
agents.goal: I want to protect food security without destroying the conditions for future agricultural innovation. I need to decide whether emergency collective need justifies suspending a company's legal control over the seed.

agents.name: CEO Adrian Volk
agents.identity: I am the chief executive of the seed company that invested for years before the drought made our work politically irresistible. If governments can void our rights the moment success matters most, no one will fund the next generation of climate-resilient crops.
agents.goal: I want Beatriz to preserve the patent regime and instead subsidize purchases through targeted aid. I believe confiscating seed rights during crisis will satisfy today's anger at the cost of tomorrow's innovation capacity.

choices: I will issue the emergency patent waiver so farmers can save and replant the drought-resistant seed, prioritizing immediate food security over intellectual-property protection.
I will uphold the patent and seek subsidies or aid instead, protecting the innovation system even if many farmers still cannot afford the seed this season.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Beatriz Nunez must decide whether to suspend the seed patent during the drought emergency. What does Beatriz Nunez do?
